content.text: Noted on the epic-sync hook — I'll sync epic #175 after the doc edits. Continuing the bullet updates:

input.old_string:
- [ ] ⬜ Health score stat cards + 7-day trend chart
- [ ] ⬜ Per-suite pass / fail progress bars — warn / fail / critical breakdown
- [ ] 🟡 Results filter bar — env, datasource type, suite, date range, status — _run **status** filter + pipeline **provider** filter shipped (PR-C1); env/datasource/suite/date-range pending_
- [ ] 🟡 Failed check drill-down — sample failing rows from GX result — _per-check drill-down shipped (PR-C1); **sample rows withheld** pending row-level PII redaction ([#226](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/226), ADR 0018)_
- [ ] ⬜ Per-check historical trend chart
- [ ] 🟡 Orchestration status panel — pipeline/DAG status, polls every 30s, correlated DQ result — _pipeline-runs feed + status shipped (PR-C1, `/pipeline_runs` tab); 30s auto-poll + DQ-run correlation pending_
- [ ] ⬜ Datasource type filter — Snowflake / flat file / Unity Catalog toggle
- [ ] ⬜ CSV + PDF export of results
- [ ] ⬜ **Recent runs audit table with drill-down link to results** _(moved from Week 5 — see that week's Execution-UI note)_ — the cross-suite recent-runs widget on the C0b read API (`GET /runs`), each row deep-linking to the run-detail route. **Why deferred from W5:** its page-home is the Week-6 **Enhanced Monitoring Dashboard** (`/dashboard`, prototype-adoption task below — which already lists a recent-runs table among its hosted widgets), and its drill-down target is the Week-6 routed run-detail page (`/results/:runId`, [#268](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/268)). Both prerequisites are W6 work, and the dashboard gates on a chart-library decision — so building a throwaway standalone table on `/results` in W5 then rebuilding it on `/dashboard` was avoided in favour of building it once, here. Build it as part of the Dashboard page (or its own component the Dashboard mounts).
- [x] ✅ Severity badge colours — green / amber / red / dark red — severity-tier (pass/warn/fail/critical) + run-status tag colour maps in `resultsFormat.ts`, rendered as antd Tags on the runs table + run detail (PR-C1)
- [ ] ⬜ Health score weighting — apply warn/fail/critical penalty weights
input.new_string:
- [x] ✅ Health score stat cards + 7-day trend chart — `/dashboard` `MetricCard` row (Data Integrity / Pass-rate / Total Runs / Active Connections — only backend-backed KPIs, dropped Anomalies + Time-to-Resolution for KPI honesty; 24h/7d/30d Segmented → `window_days`) + the recharts stacked-bar **Quality Trends** chart (succeeded vs failed runs/day, zero-filled), both on `GET /dashboard/summary` (PR #333, Phase 2.1–2.3)
- [x] ✅ Per-suite pass / fail progress bars — warn / fail / critical breakdown — per-suite health `Progress` bars (state-coloured, worst-first; "No data" for null-score suites) beside Quality Trends, on the `summary` per-suite performance block (PR #333, Phase 2.4)
- [x] ✅ Results filter bar — env, datasource type, suite, date range, status — run **status** + pipeline **provider** filters shipped (PR-C1); **env / datasource / suite / date-window** added to the runs tab (PR-C2). Env + datasource joined via each suite's connection; date filter uses preset windows (24h/7d/30d, no dayjs dep). _(folds in the **Datasource type filter** task below — ADLS+S3 collapse into one "Flat file" category)_
- [ ] 🟡 Failed check drill-down — sample failing rows from GX result — _per-check drill-down shipped (PR-C1, now the routed run-detail page); **sample rows still withheld** pending row-level PII redaction ([#226](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/226), ADR 0018)_
- [x] ✅ Per-check historical trend chart — run-detail expandable result row → recharts line of `metric_value` over runs (points coloured by severity, lazy per-row fetch), on `GET /suites/{sid}/checks/{cid}/history` (PR #333, Phase 2.6; home = run-detail page, per-check in context)
- [x] ✅ Orchestration status panel — pipeline/DAG status, polls every 30s, correlated DQ result — pipeline-runs feed + status shipped (PR-C1); **30s auto-poll** + a **DQ-run** column correlating each pipeline run to the run(s) it triggered via the `triggered_by` marker `<provider>:<pipeline>:<run_id>` added (PR-C2)
- [x] ✅ Datasource type filter — Snowflake / flat file / Unity Catalog toggle — shipped as part of the Results filter bar above (PR-C2; new `DATASOURCE_CATEGORY` map collapses ADLS+S3 → "Flat file")
- [x] ✅ CSV + PDF export of results — **CSV + JSON** download menu on the run-detail header (RFC-4180 CSV; JSON = run meta + checks; sample rows never in the payload, PII). **PDF deferred to backlog** (extra dep, little gain over CSV/JSON) (PR #333, Phase 1.2)
- [x] ✅ **Recent runs audit table with drill-down link to results** _(moved from Week 5)_ — cross-suite recent-runs widget on `/dashboard` (`GET /runs`, limit 8), each row deep-linking to `/results/:runId` + "View all" → Results (PR #333, Phase 2.5)
- [x] ✅ Severity badge colours — green / amber / red / dark red — severity-tier (pass/warn/fail/critical) + run-status tag colour maps in `resultsFormat.ts`, rendered as antd Tags on the runs table + run detail (PR-C1)
- [x] ✅ Health score weighting — apply warn/fail/critical penalty weights — health score computed in SQL per ADR 0005 weights (warn 0.5 / fail 1.0 / critical 2.0) in `dashboard_service`, surfaced on the dashboard summary + per-suite bars (PR #333, Phase 2.1)

+### Prototype adoption — full screen set as dedicated-page flows (added — not in original roadmap) (10 tasks — 3/10 ✅) — tracked in epic [#175](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/175); ADR [0022](adr/0022-week6-prototype-adoption-and-chart-library.md)

> Adopt the **DataQ Design System** prototype (claude.ai/design project *"DataQ Design System"*, reverse-engineered from the shipped indigo/antd app — its `readme.md` is the spec) — **the full 13-screen set this week**, not a subset (ADR [0022](adr/0022-week6-prototype-adoption-and-chart-library.md); the earlier 6-task scope under-counted it — Profile content, **Settings** (pulled in from Week 7), the Admin layout-reconcile, and the New-Connection source-select split were missing). The **foundation already matches** the product (`theme.ts` palette, `resultsFormat.ts` status model, the 56px-header/220px-sider shell), so this is **not a re-skin** — it adopts the prototype's **structure**: every create/edit flow becomes a dedicated, deep-linkable **page** (the **Share** drawer stays the *only* drawer), login lands on an **Enhanced Monitoring Dashboard**, and standard **error pages** ship. **Where the prototype differs from the shipped app (drawer-vs-page, layout), the prototype wins.** Components are reproduced with **real antd** — the prototype's framework-free recreations + `_ds_bundle.js` are reference only (per the design README). Post-v1 items (marketing, dark mode) + the polish passes (KPI honesty, visual-fidelity) stay in Week 7 / Post-v1 below. The intentionally-dropped prototype bits (the **"View as" role switch**, the **component bundle**, the **teal palette**) are recorded in Post-v1 as *not adopted*.

> **Design source — how to open the prototype (read before picking up any task in this track):** the claude.ai/design project **"DataQ Design System"** — `projectId` **`317fec67-2b8a-498c-8f6b-523750916a8d`** (owner Arijit). Read it with the **`/design-sync`** skill / **`DesignSync`** tool over the claude.ai login: `DesignSync method=list_files projectId=…`, then `method=get_file path=<…>`. Key paths: **`readme.md`** = the canonical spec (voice · color · type · spacing · status model · component/template manifest); **`guidelines/*.card.html`** = foundation specimen cards; **`templates/app/*.jsx`** = framework-free recreations of each screen; **`components/<group>/*.jsx`** = the component recreations; **`tokens/*.css`** = raw token values; **`uploads/DESIGN.md`** = the *superseded teal* brief (ignore for palette). ⚠️ The hosted share link `https://api.anthropic.com/v1/design/h/SVkQJqee7xsc2FNWVOsnIQ` returns **404** — reach the prototype via DesignSync, not the link. The `.jsx` / `_ds_bundle.js` are **reference only** — build in real antd reading `theme.ts`.

input.old_string:
- [ ] ⬜ **Nav / shell restructure** — add **Dashboard** as the landing entry; reorder the sider to **Dashboard · Connections · Suites · Results · Profile**; add the footer group **Admin · Settings · Documentation** (Admin shipped #289; Settings + Documentation are W6 tasks below). Change the login redirect `/` → `/dashboard` (was `/connections`). Touches `App.tsx` `NAV_ITEMS` + `<Routes>` only — the nav already prefix-matches ([#192](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/192)). _Design ref: `templates/app/AppShell.jsx` (white header + light sider + footer nav) + readme §"What's in here → Templates → `templates/app`" (the sidebar + footer item lists)._
- [ ] ⬜ **Enhanced Monitoring Dashboard page** (`/dashboard`, `DashboardScreen`) — the new landing screen that **hosts the existing Week-6 dashboard widgets** (health-score stat cards, 7-day quality-trend chart, per-suite performance bars, **recent-runs table** — the task moved from Week 5). This is the **page home** for the "Health score stat cards", "Per-suite pass/fail bars", "Per-check historical trend chart" and "Recent runs audit table" tasks above — build them here rather than on `/results`. **Chart library: `recharts`** (decided in ADR [0022](adr/0022-week6-prototype-adoption-and-chart-library.md) — lightweight, MIT, lazy-loaded so it ships only on chart routes; clears `pnpm audit` + bundle-size gate). Render only backend-backed KPIs (see the W7 *KPI honesty pass*). _Design ref: `templates/app/DashboardScreen.jsx`; components `data/MetricCard.jsx`, `data/Card.jsx`, `feedback/ProgressBar.jsx`, `data/DataTable.jsx`; readme §"Templates" (Enhanced Monitoring — KPIs · Quality Trends · Suite Performance · Recent Runs)._
input.new_string:
- [x] ✅ **Nav / shell restructure** — primary sider **Dashboard · Connections · Suites · Results · Profile** (with icons) + bottom-pinned footer group **Admin · Settings · Documentation** (Documentation = disabled placeholder); `/` → `/dashboard` landing; `/settings` shell registered (admin-gated like Admin), footer Admin/Settings shown only to workspace admins, routes always registered (deep-link → Forbidden) (PR #333, Phase 0.2). _Design ref: `templates/app/AppShell.jsx`._
- [x] ✅ **Enhanced Monitoring Dashboard page** (`/dashboard`, `DashboardScreen`) — the landing screen hosting the dashboard widgets (KPI MetricCards, recharts Quality-Trends chart, per-suite performance bars, recent-runs table — see the Results-dashboard group above). **Chart library = `recharts`** (ADR [0022](adr/0022-week6-prototype-adoption-and-chart-library.md); lazy-loaded into its own chunk so it ships only on the `/dashboard` route — vendor chunk 388→42 kB; clears `pnpm audit` + bundle gate). Backend `GET /dashboard/summary` aggregates (health score + pass rate + run trend + per-suite perf), suite-authz-scoped, null KPIs on empty workspace (KPI honesty) (PR #333, Phase 0.1 + 2.1–2.5). _Design ref: `templates/app/DashboardScreen.jsx`._

- [ ] ⬜ **New Suite → dedicated page** (`/suites/new`, `SuiteFlow`) — extract the `SuiteDrawer` **create** path into a routed *details / source* page reusing `suiteTarget.ts` + the run-target editor (PR #246). Removes the drawer's create branch; `Suites.tsx` swaps `setDrawer({open:true})` for `navigate('/suites/new')`. _Design ref: `templates/app/SuiteFlow.jsx` (New Suite → Details/Source) → `CheckFlow.jsx` (Define Rules); readme §"Templates" full-page-flows note._

- [ ] ⬜ **Edit flows → dedicated pages** — unify edit onto the existing create pages via an `:id` route + prefill, reusing the already-extracted form specs (`connectionFormSpec.ts` / `checkForm.ts` / `suiteTarget.ts`): connection edit `/connections/:id/edit` → `ConnectionNew`; suite edit `/suites/:id/edit` → `SuiteFlow`; check edit `/suites/:id/checks/:checkId/edit` → `CheckNew`. **Removes** the `ConnectionDrawer` / `CheckDrawer` / `SuiteDrawer` **edit** drawers; the parent pages drop their `editing` / `drawer` state for `navigate()`. (Dedups with [#204](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/204).) _Design ref: `templates/app/ConnectionFlow.jsx` (Configuration), `SuiteFlow.jsx`, `CheckFlow.jsx` — the create flows; edit reuses the same page shape, prefilled._

- [ ] ⬜ **Results drill-down → dedicated route** (`/results/:runId`, `ResultsScreen` detail) — promote the in-page `openRun` `useState` ([Results.tsx:54](../frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx#L54)) to a routed run-detail page with back-nav, per-check results (severity tags + `metric_value` + observed), and CSV/JSON download. Deep-linkable + refreshable (the prototype's `ResultsScreen` flow). _Design ref: `templates/app/ResultsScreen.jsx`; readme §"Templates" (Results → click a run → Run detail with per-check results + CSV/JSON download)._

- [ ] ⬜ **New Connection → source-select + config (2-page flow)** — adopt the prototype's two-step New-Connection: a categorized **Select Source** page (**Orchestration first**, then Warehouses / Lakehouses / Cloud Storage) → the spec-driven **Configuration** page. Verify `ConnectionNew` (`/connections/new`) splits the source pick into its own step rather than one combined page. _Design ref: `templates/app/ConnectionFlow.jsx` (`ConnectionSourceScreen` → `ConnectionConfigScreen`); `connectionFormSpec.ts`; readme §"Templates" full-page-flows note._

- [ ] ⬜ **Profile page — real content** (`/profile`, `ProfileScreen`) — replace the placeholder `Home` ([App.tsx:100](../frontend/src/App.tsx#L100)) with the prototype's account screen: identity card (avatar, name, email, role tag) + workspace facts (workspace, auth = Azure AD/MSAL, suite access, member-since) on `/me`, and an **Alert channels** card whose toggles front the Week-6 `ResultPublisher` notification config (Teams etc.). Render only `/me`-backed facts (KPI-honesty). _Design ref: `templates/app/ProfileScreen.jsx`._

| **Open issues** | **41 open** — roadmap *features* are tracked as ⬜ checkboxes per week (below), not GitHub issues, so these are follow-ups / polish only. **Week-1 carryover (→ W7):** [#168](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/168) (silent token refresh) / [#169](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/169) (real Key Vault) / [#170](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/170) (prod-docs gate). **Backend:** [#124](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/124) (DQ dimensions) / [#194](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/194) + [#195](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/195) (Snowflake key-pair: encrypted keys / GX deprecated path) / [#92](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/92) (ADF webhook URL) / [#327](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/327) (profiler N+1 batching — split from #147). **Frontend (W4):** [#192](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/192) (nav prefix-match) / [#197](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/197) (Select test helper) / [#199](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/199) (toast helper) / [#204](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/204) (drawer/delete dedup) / [#205](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/205) (catalog↔GX contract test) / [#128](https://github.com/TheurgicDuke771/DataQ/issues/128) (full-stack E2E/Playwright). **Governance polish:** #8/#10/#17/#18/#19/#20. **Closed in Week 5:** #122 (skip/error), #129, #146, #147 (PR #329), #171, #172, #201, #212, #215, #216, #227, #303, **#317 (PR #328)** + the Week-5 epic #174. |

content.content:
{"body":"Tracking epic for **Week 6 — Results dashboard + alerting**. Mirrors the roadmap; the task-level source of truth remains [docs/progress.md](docs/progress.md). Milestone: `Week 6 — Results dashboard + alerting`.

**In progress — 2 / 27** (early credit: Results page scaffold + severity badge colours, PR-C1).

**Results dashboard**
- [ ] Health score stat cards + 7-day trend chart
- [ ] Per-suite pass / fail progress bars — updated to show warn / fail / critical breakdown
- [ ] Results filter bar — by env, datasource type, suite, date range, status (incl. warn / fail / critical) _(status + provider filters shipped PR-C1; rest pending)_
- [ ] Failed check drill-down — sample failing rows from GX result _(per-check drill-down shipped PR-C1; sample rows pending PII redaction #226)_
- [ ] Per-check historical trend chart (not just overall health score)
- [ ] ADF pipeline status panel — polls every 30s; webhook-pushed failures + polling-filled succeeded runs; correlated DQ result _(pipeline-runs feed shipped PR-C1; 30s poll + correlation pending)_
- [ ] Datasource type filter — toggle Snowflake / flat file / Unity Catalog on results view
- [ ] CSV + PDF export of results
- [ ] **Recent runs audit table with drill-down link to results** — _moved from Week 5_ (epic #174). The cross-suite recent-runs widget on the C0b read API (`GET /runs`), each row deep-linking to the run-detail route. **Built once in its final home:** its page-home is the Enhanced Monitoring Dashboard (`/dashboard`, below) and its drill-down target is the routed run-detail page (`/results/:runId`, #268).
- [x] Severity badge colours — green (pass), amber (warn), red (fail), dark red (critical) — applied across result tables/drill-downs (PR-C1)
- [ ] Health score weighting — apply agreed penalty weights (warn / fail / critical) in the health-score calc; severity breakdown in the 7-day trend tooltip

**Alerting**
- [ ] `ResultPublisher` seam — dispatch run outcomes through a publisher interface (Teams = v1 impl); PII/opt-in policy on `sample_failures` at the seam (ADR 0011)
- [ ] Notification config UI — Teams webhook per suite, alert on fail / warn / always
- [ ] Alert suppression / snooze — silence a specific check for N hours
- [ ] Alert dedup — fire on first failure only, not on every subsequent scheduled run
- [ ] Teams adaptive card payload — check name, datasource, table / file, observed vs expected
- [ ] Severity-aware alert routing — `warn` quieter, `fail` standard, `critical` @channel + distinct styling

**Prototype adoption — full screen set as dedicated-page flows (added — not in original roadmap; ADR [0022](../blob/main/docs/adr/0022-week6-prototype-adoption-and-chart-library.md))**
> DataQ Design System prototype adoption — **the full 13-screen set this week**, not a subset. Where the prototype differs from the shipped app (drawer-vs-page, layout), **the prototype wins**. The Share drawer is the only surviving drawer. Mirrors the matching group in [docs/progress.md](docs/progress.md) (the task-level source of truth).
- [ ] Nav / shell restructure — Dashboard landing entry + reordered sider + footer group (Admin · Settings · Documentation); login redirect `/` → `/dashboard`
- [ ] Enhanced Monitoring Dashboard page (`/dashboard`, `DashboardScreen`) — hosts the Week-6 dashboard widgets **incl. the moved-in recent-runs table**; chart library = **recharts** (ADR 0022, lazy-loaded)
- [ ] New Suite → dedicated page (`/suites/new`, `SuiteFlow`)
- [ ] Edit flows → dedicated pages (connection / suite / check `:id` routes; removes the edit drawers)
- [ ] Results drill-down → dedicated route (`/results/:runId`, `ResultsScreen` detail) — #268
- [ ] Standard error pages (4xx / 5xx) — `ErrorState` in the app shell + router catch-all
- [ ] New Connection → source-select + config (2-page flow) — categorized Select Source (Orchestration first) → spec-driven Configuration
- [ ] Profile page — real content (`/profile`, `ProfileScreen`) — identity + workspace facts on `/me` + alert-channel toggles (replaces the placeholder Home)
- [ ] Workspace Settings page (`/settings`, `SettingsScreen`) — _moved in from Week 7_; page shell + real-backend controls only (Key Vault state via the generic secret seam, no Azure names)
- [ ] Admin page — reconcile layout to prototype (KPI MetricCards + Members & access + All-suites tables; presentation only, on the existing `/admin/*` endpoints from #289)

_Severity badge colours (✅) + the Results page scaffold landed early in PR-C1 (the GX-Cloud redesign Phase C)._
